pyth_naive.interpretation: Pyth published price ± 1.96·conf, read as a 95% CI

pyth_consumer_fit.interpretation: Pyth at ±50·conf — the consumer-supplied multiplier needed to hit 95%

chainlink_stale.interpretation: Chainlink Data Streams during marketStatus=5: bid≈0, ask=0, no published band. 100% of weekend observations.
